title: Oganesson
description: A modpack that will optimize Minecraft
body:
# Oganesson: Less usage, better performance.

As the title says, this Modpack will let Minecraft use less of your PC, or reach a higher FPS.

*(ps. NoWasting is the oringinal name of this modpack, and i'm too lazy to change.)*

Supported version:
`1.12.2 Forge-No Optifine + Vintagium, 1.16.5 Fabric, 1.18.2 Fabric, 1.20.4 Fabric (NVIDIA), 1.21.0 Fabric (NVIDIA)`

Planned version:
`1.7.10 Forge-(No) Optifine, 1.8.9 Forge-(No) Optifine, 1.12.2 Forge Optifine, 1.20.6 Fabric, 1.21.1 Fabric (NVIDIA + General), 1.21.0 General`

-----------------

Proofs that we're better:

(1.12.2, Forge, no Optifine)
![1.12.2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/54c10f6d89c7e5668373e3c0d11ed944bcd8c1db.png)

(1.16.5, Fabric)
![1.16.5](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7203eb29afc3e18f4909a56cb901033a419fa25e.png)

(1.18.2, Fabric)
![1.18.2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b4730b51e51fa358bbf74ad71c58006ea2a1b7df.jpeg)

(1.20.4, Fabric, NVIDIA ONLY version)
![1.20.4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/06fdadb66b370eb1b6636aadb6b65ae85b2202ab.png)

*CPU: Intel Core i5-10400F @2.90GHz*

*GPU: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1660 SUPER*

*Memory: 32 GB, Allocated 2 GiB*

*Effects may vary with PC hardware.*
